task_completion.description: OpenOffice Writer is open and populated with the water quality report content, including titles, text, and the contaminant data table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Apache OpenOffice Writer interface with the report text and a data table visible in the document workspace.

task_completion.description: The main title is formatted as 'Heading 1' and section titles as 'Heading 2'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The formatting toolbar or Styles and Formatting pane displays 'Heading 1' when the main title is selected, or 'Heading 2' when a section title is selected.

task_completion.description: The chart image is inserted into the 'Test Results' section of the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'ph_levels_chart.png' (a chart/graph) is visible within the document pages, specifically located under or near the 'Test Results' heading.

task_completion.description: The Alternative Text (Description) for the inserted image is set to the required text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Picture dialog (Options tab) or Description dialog is open for the image, showing the 'Alternative (Text Only)' or 'Description' field containing exactly: 'Annual pH levels showing stability between 7.2 and 7.4'.

task_completion.description: The first row of the Contaminant Data table is configured as a repeating header row.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Table Format dialog (Text Flow tab) is open showing the 'Repeat heading' checkbox checked, or the table is split across pages with the header row visibly repeating.

task_completion.description: The document title property is set to '2024 Water Quality Report'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The File > Properties dialog (Description tab) is open, showing the 'Title' field filled with '2024 Water Quality Report'.

task_completion.description: The document is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenOffice Writer window title bar displays 'Oakwood_CCR_2024.odt' or the Save As dialog shows the file being saved as 'Oakwood_CCR_2024.odt' in the Documents folder.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Apache OpenOffice Writer GUI to create the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenOffice Writer application interface being actively used, rather than just a terminal window executing a script to generate the file.

integrity.description: The agent used genuine OpenOffice dialog boxes to set properties.
integrity.visual_evidence: Settings for image alt text, table headers, and document properties are shown in standard OpenOffice dialog windows (e.g., Picture, Table Format, Properties).

integrity.description: The actual chart image was inserted, not a placeholder.
integrity.visual_evidence: The image visible in the document is a graphical chart (pH levels), not an empty frame, text box, or generic icon.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file is '/home/ga/Documents/Oakwood_CCR_2024.odt'. The document must use 'Heading 1' for the main title and 'Heading 2' for section titles. The inserted image must have the exact Alternative Text (Description): 'Annual pH levels showing stability between 7.2 and 7.4'. The document properties Title must be exactly '2024 Water Quality Report'.
